arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher launches scathing attack on Tottenham after Liverpool humiliation
arts.sum: Liverpool dismantled Tottenham at Anfield to secure a place in the Carabaoo Cup final as the Lilywhites put in a limp display despite holding a lead from the first leg

arts.ttl: 'Horrendous': Jamie Redknapp says Tottenham did a once-in-a-lifetime thing tonight that's truly shocked him
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur’s quest to reach the League Cup final has come to a hugely disappointing end as Liverpool ran out 4-1 winners on aggregate. Spurs...

arts.ttl: Ange handed Rangers olive branch as Tottenham bluntness laid bare by one thing in Liverpool drubbing
arts.sum: The former Celtic boss will not be heading to Wembley after his team crumbled at Anfield

arts.ttl: How many trophies have Tottenham won?
arts.sum: Tottenham's lack of recent silverware continues to frustrate their own fans and delight rival supporters, but how many trophies have they won?

arts.ttl: Holders Liverpool put Tottenham to the sword to reach Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: The Reds failed 1-0 after the first leg, but goals from Cody Gapko, Mohamed Salah, Dominik Szoboszlai and Virgil van Dijk sealed a return to Wembley.

arts.ttl: Greatest 'wind-up' celebrations in Premier League history: Emmanuel Adebayor gets his Arsenal revenge, Jamie Vardy's constant Tottenham jibes and the origin of Neal Maupay's beef with James Maddison
arts.sum: Thirty-three years worth of Premier League football has produced quite the catalogue of 'wind-up' celebrations, but, in truth, we are entering a golden age.

arts.ttl: Tottenham fans stunned by what they saw Mathys Tel do in League Cup loss to Liverpool
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been knocked out of the League Cup at the semi-final stage as Liverpool ran out 4-1 winners on aggregate. Tottenham went to...

arts.ttl: Liverpool Premier League fixture change confirmed after reaching Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: Liverpool are through to the Carabao Cup final, which means a massive Premier League match has been brought forward

arts.ttl: Moment Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk escapes red card despite appearing to ELBOW Richarlison in Carabao Cup semi-final against Tottenham
arts.sum: Van Dijk caught the Tottenham forward with a stray arm as they pair tussled for the ball in the second minute at Anfield, with Richarlison seeing holding his face after an apparent elbow.

arts.ttl: Former teammate tips Liverpool star to join one of Barcelona or Real Madrid this summer
arts.sum: Spanish football’s two leading clubs have this week been tipped as potential landing spots for Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk. This comes amid mounting speculation, pointing towards what would mark…
